feed.title: BIP Proposal: Stateless PSBT Coordination (Blind Relay)

entry.title: BIP Proposal: Stateless PSBT Coordination (Blind Relay)
entry.summary:
The recent release of version 2.0.0 of Signing Room introduces several significant improvements, enhancing its functionality and user experience. One of the standout features of this new version is the inclusion of a drop-in web component that allows for straightforward integration using just one HTML tag, simplifying the implementation process significantly for developers. This update aims to broaden the accessibility and ease of use of the Signing Room software across various platforms.
For those interested in exploring the full details of the enhancements and updates included in this release, the complete release notes are available on GitHub. You can access them by visiting [the release notes](https://github.com/scarlin90/signingroom/releases/tag/v2.0.0). This documentation provides a thorough overview of all changes and improvements made in this latest version, offering users and developers alike a comprehensive understanding of the capabilities now available with version 2.0.0.
